summary: Frontend testing of /celebrate-soul page regressions: Breed Cakes (42 products, is_active fix), Mira's Picks deduplication (Salmon Delight Cake once), and all other category modals. All critical fixes verified working.

issues: Shows 60 items (API limit=60) instead of all 111 products - by design, limit cap in CATEGORY_API. Not a bug unless user expects all 111.

test_results.hero_celebrations_mojo: ✅ PASS - Hero shows 'Celebrations for Mojo' with Soul 89%-95% and soul chips (Allergy: chicken, Loves: Chicken · car rides, Playful · Loyal · The Social Butterfly)
test_results.category_strip_11_categories: ✅ PASS - All 11 categories present (Birthday Cakes, Breed Cakes, Pupcakes & Dognuts, Desi Treats, Frozen Treats, Gift Hampers, Bundles, Party & Decor, Nut Butters, Soul Picks, Mira's Picks)
test_results.breed_cakes_42_products: ✅ PASS - Breed Cakes modal shows 'ALL BREED CAKES — 42 ITEMS', 'Indie' cake appears first in 'Made for your breed' section
test_results.breed_cakes_indie_first: ✅ PASS - 'Indie' cake appears at top of breed section with 'For Mojo' badge
test_results.birthday_cakes_products: ✅ PASS - Birthday Cakes modal opens with 60 items (limit capped, products load correctly)
test_results.miras_picks_mira_imagines_section: ✅ PASS - 'MIRA IMAGINES — JUST FOR MOJO' section present
test_results.miras_picks_salmon_delight_cake_once: ✅ PASS - 'Salmon Delight Cake' appears exactly ONCE (deduplication fix verified, no duplicate)
test_results.miras_picks_adventure_walk: ✅ PASS - 'Adventure Walk Party Pack' activity-based card found
test_results.miras_picks_real_cakes_grid: ✅ PASS - 'MIRA'S PICKS — CAKES MOJO WOULD LOVE' section with real products below

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ getLovedFoods() correctly parses pet.learned_facts in multiple formats
✅ extractSoulTraits() correctly extracts activities (morning walks → Adventure Walk Party Pack card)
✅ seenFoodKeys deduplication in foodImaginary filter prevents Salmon Delight Cake appearing twice
⚠️ Birthday Cakes limit=60 in CATEGORY_API but there are 111 cakes total - this may be intentional design decision

test_credentials.pet: Mojo (Indie breed, loves salmon treats, morning walks)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical regression fixes verified: 1) Breed Cakes shows 42 products (is_active fix working), 2) Mira's Picks shows Salmon Delight Cake exactly once (no duplicate), 3) Adventure Walk Party Pack activity card present, 4) All 11 category modals open and show products. Soul score shows 89-95% (varies by API call timing).
rca_of_issue: Root cause was is_active=null on 253 products preventing them from appearing in API results. Fix involved: 1) Setting is_active=True for those products in DB, 2) Backend filter updated to include is_active=None, 3) Frontend getLovedFoods() and extractSoulTraits() improved for better parsing. Deduplication fix (seenFoodKeys Set) prevents same food from generating multiple imaginary cards.
